description: Named team templates for construct headhunt. Each template defines a focused group of cx-* specialists for a common workflow pattern.

incident.description: Production incident response — triage, mitigation, and resolution.
promotionGates: Status page updated before investigation begins

release.description: Release readiness — quality gate, security check, and rollout coordination.
promotionGates: Security scan complete with no critical findings

discovery.description: Product discovery — user research, requirements, and opportunity scoping.
promotionGates: PRD, Meta PRD, or brief written before design begins

post-mortem.description: Post-incident review — blameless root cause analysis and action items.
promotionGates: Timeline written within 48 hours of resolution
Action items assigned with owners and due dates

architecture.description: Architecture review — design, tradeoffs, and challenge before implementation.

feature.description: End-to-end feature delivery — design, implementation, QA, and review.

security-review.description: Security audit — threat modeling, code audit, and remediation.
promotionGates: Threat model scoped before audit begins
All critical findings remediated before sign-off
Findings documented in ADR or security log

data-pipeline.description: Data engineering — pipeline design, quality gates, and warehouse modeling.
promotionGates: Data contract defined before pipeline build
Data quality checks implemented and passing
